text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Ack! Th-that wasn't a yawn! I was just, um... just
doing some deep breathing exercises!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That reminds me, I'm pretty sure she mentioned a
test of hers coming up.
choice_data_list: Did you stay up all night studying?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Grr! How come you hit the nail on the head at the
weirdest times?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Well, you won't catch me yawning a second time!
Just watch!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
True to her word, she doesn't yawn again,
although I can tell it takes a lot of effort.
